title: crotalaria cylindrostachys
intro: Crotalaria cylindrostachys, also known as the cylindrical stickseed, is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae) native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Crotalaria cylindrostachys include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria cylindrostachys may include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity and side effects.
